title: chrysanthemum leucanthemum var. leucolepis
intro: Chrysanthemum leucanthemum var. leucolepis, also known as the Pyrethrum Daisy or Pyrethrum, is a variety of the chrysanthemum plant that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It is a flowering plant that has been used for centuries for its medicinal and insecticidal properties, with the flowers containing pyrethrin, a natural insecticide that is used to repel and kill insects. The medicinal properties of Chrysanthemum leucanthemum var. leucolepis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, while its health benefits include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and soothe skin irritations. Chrysanthemum leucanthemum var. leucolepis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, tincture, and topical creams, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
